MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge Cynthia M. Lee; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint;
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CALVIN GRIGSBY, TEL. NO. 860-6446 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ETHAN DETTMER OF GIBSON DUNN, TEL. NO. 393-8292 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS GRIGSBY & ASSOCIATES, INC. AND CALVIN GRIGSBY's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is off calendar without prejudice of refiling motion. Plaintiff filed a notice of settlement of the entire action on September 13, 2013. In any event, the moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the motion that complies with CRC 3.1110(f) [format of exhibits/tabbing]. The moving party also failed to provide a courtesy copy of the response to opposition in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The court instructed Mr. Grigsby to remove or amend the Notice of settlement of the entire action if he is only dismissing one party in the case. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-15-2013 Set For Trial On Oct-21-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiffs Grigsby & Associates, Inc., Calvin Grigsby, Jerry Liang'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Calvin Grigsby, Esq., Tel. 415.392.4800, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf;
Garrett R. Wynne, Esq. of Keesal Young & Logan, Tel. 415.981.0136, for defendant and opposing party Mr. Ceresa;
Rachel A. Flipse, Esq. of Gibson Dunn, Tel. 415.393.8385, for defendant and opposing party FINRA.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court took PLAINTIFFS GRIGSBY & ASSOCIATED, INC., CALVIN GRIGSBY and JERRY LIANG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT under submission. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
